use_cases: Display customer testimonials and reviews on a landing page
Build social proof by showcasing user feedback in a card-based layout
Present client quotes with attribution in a clean, organized grid
Feature user experiences for marketing or portfolio websites
ai_summary: A testimonials section component that displays customer reviews and feedback in an organized card-based layout. Features shadcn/ui Card primitives with customizable headers, content areas, and footers. Designed to showcase social proof with minimal visual overhead, suitable for landing pages and marketing sections across various industries.
